RawMarkdown:
## Scott Galloway
Email: scott.galloway@gmail.com | Phone: 07498479614 (please email in the first instance)
Blog: mostlylucid.net | GitHub: github.com/scottgal/
## Technical Summary
Full‑stack, full‑cycle engineer with 20+ years of experience building resilient platforms and teams. Specialized in .NET (classic to Core), Azure/Kubernetes, and AI/ML integrations. Known for architecting and building systems end‑to‑end, modernizing legacy estates, and mentoring developers into high‑performing teams. Thrives in startup environments where speed, clarity, and resilience matter most.
## Technical Expertise
Backend Development: ASP.NET Core, .NET 6/7/8/9, C#, RESTful APIs, Microservices Architecture, Domain-Driven Design (DDD), Event-Driven Systems, gRPC, SignalR
AI & Machine Learning: LLM systems & orchestration (multi-agent, tool-calling, self-optimizing workflows – Code Evolver/DSE), custom NMT (mostlylucid-nmt with EasyNMT), RAG & vector search (pgvector, Qdrant, OpenSearch), OpenAI / Azure OpenAI, embeddings-based search & recommendations, ML.NET, scikit-learn, NLP
Cloud & Infrastructure: Microsoft Azure, Azure Functions, Docker, Kubernetes, Azure DevOps, Infrastructure-as-Code (Bicep), CI/CD Pipelines (GitHub Actions, GitLab), Application Insights
Frontend Technologies: HTMX, Alpine.js, React, Vue.js, Blazor Server/WASM, Tailwind CSS, Responsive Design, JavaScript/TypeScript
Databases & Search: SQL Server, PostgreSQL, MySQL, MongoDB, Cosmos DB, RavenDB, OpenSearch, Redis, Entity Framework Core
Tools & Practices: Git, Azure Boards, Jira, Performance Profiling, Load Testing (K6), Unit/Integration Testing, Code Review, Agile/Scrum
Writing: Over 200  blog articles covering a huge variety of topics from RAG,  advanced LLM systems, .NET, etc.  ]My blog www.mostlylucid.net covers it all in detail with practical examples (usually with demo projects).
## Professional Experience
mostlylucid limited | Owner, Principal Consultant
Jan 2012 – Present Remote
Founded and operate my own PSC, delivering highimpact technical solutions for startups and enterprise clients. Specialize in bootstrapping and “rehab” projects, often taking on CTOlevel responsibilities despite contracting titles. Maintain compliance with UK contracting regulations (IR35), consistently outside scope.
AI & LLM Systems
Designed and implemented Code Evolver / Digital Synthetic Evolution (DiSE) — an opensource, selfoptimizing multiLLM workflow framework for program synthesis, automated testing, RAGbacked reuse, and platformaware deployment (Pi/Edge/Cloud).
Built multiagent orchestration (classifier, planner, generator, evaluator) across local LLMs (Ollama) and external tools, with metricsdriven autoevolution and executable groundtruth nodes.
Repo: github.com/scottgal/
Systems Architecture & Modernization
Architected and delivered complete solutions across fintech, healthcare, and ecommerce, using .NET Core, JavaScript, Azure, and containerized microservices.
Led modernization programs, migrating legacy monoliths to cloudnative microservices, achieving 50% infrastructure cost reduction and 80% faster deployment cycles.
Designed and deployed MLbased recommendation engines and leadgeneration tools using Azure OpenAI, vector embeddings, and custom RAG pipelines for semantic search.
### Mentorship & Education
Founded and operated a developer bootcamp, creating curriculum and teaching 200+ students with a 90%+ placement rate into industry roles.
### Key Client Projects
Lead Architect for a major Asian airline: developed Knockout.js & ASP.NET MVC booking system.
R&D Developer for insurance telemetry: built lowlevel socket system in .NET for realtime tracking.
Research Systems Architect on UK Government National Security project: designed distributed computing frameworks.
Technical Consultant for 8 UK and international charities, delivering scalable, costeffective digital platforms
ZenChef Ltd | Lead Contract Developer
Oct 2024 – Present | Remote
Migrated large distributed legacy system to .NET 8, refactoring core services and optimizing Azure resource usage to reduce costs while improving reliability
Implemented comprehensive performance optimization using Application Insights, custom telemetry, and load testing to identify and resolve bottlenecks
Provided rapid technical support for complex microservices architecture with event-driven patterns, ensuring system stability during critical business operations
Very Jane Ltd | Senior Backend Developer
Apr 2024 – Aug 2024 | Remote
Developed scalable backend modules for ecommerce platform, implementing Stripe Connect and Hyperwallet payment integrations with robust error handling and reconciliation
Bootstrapped new platform from scratch using .NET Core and PostgreSQL, creating comprehensive test data generation and validation systems for customer product imports
Designed data validation and migration pipelines to ensure high reliability when processing customer-delivered data
Seamcor Ltd | Head of Engineering (Contract)
Dec 2022 – Apr 2024 | Remote
Led technical re-architecture of enterprise production management system, coordinating work across team of 10+ engineers
Implemented Docker Compose orchestration and integrated OpenSearch for powerful full-text search and analytics, enabling customer-specific deployments
Redesigned system architecture to support both cloud-native Azure deployments and cost-effective on-premises installations using PostgreSQL, OpenSearch, and containerized services
Mentored junior developers and conducted code reviews to maintain high code quality standards
GBG Plc (Loqate) | Lead Engineer
Aug 2022 – Nov 2022 | Remote
Worked with a highly complex address lookup system.
Used dozens of Kubernetes ElasticSearch instances to deliver a high performance system using Go & C#.
Built comprehensive testing infrastructure using K6 for load testing and performance validation, reducing development cycle time by 80% through rapid feedback loops
Optimized API response times and throughput to handle global-scale traffic with sub-second latency requirements
WCOM AB | Lead Developer (Contract)
Oct 2021 – May 2022 | Remote
Developed real-time collaboration tools using Blazor Server with Azure Functions backend and SignalR for WebSocket communication
Built screen mirroring and inter-process communication (IPC) modules using WPF, improving usability for logistics and remote work scenarios
Implemented efficient state synchronization patterns for real-time multi-user applications
H3Space Ltd | Lead Engineer
Jun 2021 – Sep 2021 | Remote
Designed complete backend cloud architecture for Unity-based SaaS platform, implementing React frontend with GraphQL API layer
Built scalable Azure infrastructure with containerized services, CI/CD pipelines, and automated deployment workflows
Hired and mentored global development team, establishing coding standards and delivering MVP within 90 days
Huozhi Ltd | Technical Consultant / Dev Lead
Jun 2018 – Mar 2020 | Remote
Modernized legacy fintech platform, implementing comprehensive performance profiling to identify and resolve bottlenecks in critical payment processing paths
Refactored API layer for improved scalability and implemented caching strategies to handle increased load
Coordinated distributed team using Scrum and established CI/CD pipelines for reliable biweekly releases
Interactive Reporting Ltd | Lead Developer (Contract)
Dec 2015 – Jun 2021 | Remote
Developed cross-platform reporting engine using ASP.NET MVC and WPF with custom rendering pipeline
Implemented multi-database support layer with unified query abstraction over SQL Server, MySQL, and SQLite
Built flexible data visualization components for complex analytics workloads and business intelligence reporting
Dell | Development Lead
Jan 2011 – Jul 2011 | Glasgow, UK
Architected and implemented internal machine provisioning platform using ASP.NET MVC and SQL Server, automating deployment workflows and reducing setup time by 70%
Designed RESTful API for inventory management and server configuration
Microsoft Corp. | Program Manager II
Jan 2007 – Oct 2009 | Redmond, WA
Managed ASP.NET release planning and feature prioritization, coordinating across multiple product teams
Led development of security platform for Project Server, designing authentication and authorization infrastructure to improve enterprise compliance
Worked directly with engineering teams on implementation details and technical specifications
Microsoft Ltd. | Application Development Consultant II
Jun 2005 – Jan 2007 | Reading, UK
Conducted enterprise application performance audits for FTSE 100 clients, identifying bottlenecks and providing detailed optimization recommendations
Delivered architecture improvement plans covering database optimization, caching strategies, and application redesign
StormID | Lead Developer
Feb 2003 – Jun 2005 | Edinburgh, UK
Built custom CMS and ecommerce solutions using .NET and SQL Server for diverse clients under tight agency deadlines
Developed reusable component libraries and frameworks to accelerate project delivery
## Education
University of Stirling – BSc (Hons) Psychology
Stirling, Scotland, UK
